name: socratic-codex
description: Checkpoint policy for advanced coding agents: preserve intent, sustain authorized progress, recover with falsifiable diagnosis, and close against evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Sustain and verify long coding goals.
interface.longDescription: Socratic Codex adds four checkpoints for advanced coding agents: preserve the user's goal in native host state, decide from inspected evidence at user-owned boundaries, replace blind retries with falsifiable diagnosis, and continue safe authorized work until requested outcomes match observed evidence or a real terminal condition is reached. Use it for long-running goal steering, drift recovery, premature-exit prevention, consequential goal changes, and acceptance; skip clear routine work.
defaultPrompt: Use $socratic-codex to carry this goal through evidence-backed acceptance.
Use $socratic-codex to recover this stuck investigation.
Use $socratic-codex to close this request against evidence.
